message:
feat(layout): 6-panel mega layout with dedicated attention column

Expand mega layout from 5 to 6 panels, giving the attention panel its
own dedicated column instead of sharing the alerts column.

Layout (internal/tui/layout/layout.go):
- New MegaProportions6() returning 6-column widths:
  Agents 15% | Detail 26% | Beads 18% | Alerts 15% | Attention 12% | Sidebar 14%

Tests (dashboard_layout_test.go):
- Attention visibility by tier (hidden below 120, visible at 120+)
- Focus ring cycling includes attention at split tier
- Split view renders attention when focused
- Ultra layout keeps detail visible alongside attention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
